# Compiled Output (`out`)

This directory will contain the compiled bytecode (`.class` files) generated by the Java compiler.

* **Do not edit files here manually.**
* These files are automatically regenerated when you run the build scripts (`MoneyCount.sh` or `MoneyCount.bat`).
* If you encounter strange errors, you can safely delete the contents of this folder and run the script again to force a clean recompile.
